Event: Darkness Castle Siege Dec 2024
Event Date: 12/12/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: D13


Other locations the gear can be found
Siege Rammer Chest
Plush Corporal Daggers

When attacking, has a [12%-13%] chance of dealing [100%-120%] damage in 5 seconds.
When attacking, the unit has a 60% chance to throw a shuriken at a random enemy. The shuriken bounces off 2 enemies and applies one of the following two effects. On hit, the shuriken has a 60% chance to reduce the target's physical armor by 30% for 3 sec and deal physical damage equal to 15% of the target's max health. On hit, the shuriken has a 40% chance to tear through the target's armor. When the enemy's armor is torn, that enemy takes 150000 pure damage and has their physical armor reduced by 40% for 3 sec. Also, that enemy takes 250000 physical damage over 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100
